content:
About Fadeout

FadeOut is a simple way to plan moments with the people who matter, without turning your life into an endless group chat.

We built FadeOut for real events. A dinner. A padel match. A birthday. A weekend plan. You create an event, invite people, and keep everything in one place. RSVP, chat, and share photos for the event only. Then, when the moment is over, the event fades out.

Why FadeOut exists

Most messaging apps were built for ongoing conversations. Events are different. They have a start, an end, and a short window where coordination matters. About Fadeout FadeOut is a simple way to plan moments with the people who matter, without turning your life into an endless group chat. We built FadeOut for real events. A dinner. A padel match. A birthday. A weekend plan. You create an event, invite people, and keep everything in one place. RSVP, chat, and share photos for the event only. Then, when the moment is over, the event fades out. Why FadeOut exists Most messaging apps were built for ongoing conversations. Events are different. They have a start, an end, and a short window where coordination matters. FadeOut keeps the focus on the moment, reduces clutter, and helps everyone stay present. What makes FadeOut different Event-based by design Every chat and photo stays inside the event. Lightweight and private No feeds, no followers, no public profiles. Built to fade Events are time-bound, so your app stays clean and your conversations don’t linger forever. Our promise We keep FadeOut minimal and respectful. We don’t sell your personal data. We don’t build addictive features. We aim to give you a calm space for real-life plans. Contact Questions or support: support@fadeoutapp.comFadeOut keeps the focus on the moment, reduces clutter, and helps everyone stay present.

What makes FadeOut different

  • Event-based by design
    Every chat and photo stays inside the event.

  • Lightweight and private
    No feeds, no followers, no public profiles.

  • Built to fade
    Events are time-bound, so your app stays clean and your conversations don’t linger forever.

Our promise

We keep FadeOut minimal and respectful. We don’t sell your personal data. We don’t build addictive features. We aim to give you a calm space for real-life plans.

Contact
Questions or support: support@fadeoutapp.com
